Noble Wings Academy ← SportStar RTC
Technical Data · SportStar RTC

Detailed Specification

Complete equipment list, technical specifications and aircraft versions for the Evektor SportStar RTC.

Complete Equipment List

Controls

  • Dual control sticks
  • Dual hydraulic brakes (4 pumps)
  • Steerable nose wheel
  • Pedals adjustment with remote control lever
  • Parking brake
  • Electric Flaps Control & New Throttle in the Middle Console
  • Electrictrim with dual control switches (pitch) and trim position indicator
  • Stall speed warning system
  • Longitudinal, lateral, flaps, and nose wheel control through push/pull rods
  • Combined starting switch
  • Press-button circuit breakers
  • Avionics master switch

Interior

  • Adjustable seats with 4-point harness
  • Baggage compartment behind seats (25 kg max)
  • Luxury cabin finish with wide seats (1.18 m cabin width)
  • Panoramic visibility canopy with aerodynamic geometry
  • Heated cabin / ventilation
  • USB charging ports
  • Map pockets & document holders
  • Fuel level indicators visible from cockpit

Exterior

  • Metal airframe — all-metal construction
  • Low-wing monoplane configuration
  • Tricycle retractable landing gear with steerable nose wheel
  • Fixed pitch or variable pitch Woodcomp propeller
  • Navigation lights (red/green/white)
  • Anti-collision strobe lights
  • Landing light in nose cowling
  • Static ports and pitot tube with heating
  • Tow hook (optional)

Power Plant

  • Rotax 912 ULS / S — 100 hp (74.6 kW)
  • Manufacturer: Bombardier Rotax
  • 4-stroke, 4-cylinder horizontally opposed engine
  • Liquid cooled cylinder heads, air cooled cylinders
  • Dual ignition system
  • Fuel: Unleaded automotive gasoline or AVGAS 100LL
  • Fuel tank: 2 × 60 L wing tanks (120 L total)
  • 3-blade adjustable propeller — Woodcomp Klasik 170
  • Electric fuel pump + mechanical pump

Optional Equipment

  • Ballistic Parachute System (BRS)
  • Second COM radio
  • ADS-B In/Out transponder
  • Autopilot (Garmin GFC 500)
  • Oxygen system
  • Night VFR lighting package
  • Winter operational kit
  • Tow hook for glider towing
  • Custom livery and colour options
Technical Data
Dimensions
Length5.98 m
Wing Span8.65 m
Height2.48 m
Cabin Width1.18 m

Weights & Load
Baggage Weight25 kg
Seats2
Fuel Tank Volume120 L
Design Load Factors+6 / -3 g
Operational Load Factors+4 / -2 g

Performance (Rotax 912S)
Take-off distance128 m / 420 ft
Landing distance169 m / 555 ft
Rate of Climb4.5 m/s / 876 fpm
Max Cruise Speed213.9 kph / 115 kts
Stall Speed78 kph / 42 kts
Never Exceed Speed270 kph / 146 kts
Standard Range1,300 km

Garmin G3X Touch cockpit — dual 10.6" displays with PFD and MFD

Available Configurations

Aircraft Versions

Garmin G3X Touch

Avionics

  • 10.6" PFD — Primary Flight Display (GDU 460)
  • 10.6" MFD — Multi Function Display (GDU 460)
  • 2 ADAHRS — Air Data and Attitude Reference (GSU 25)
  • Magnetometer (GMU 22)
  • EMS (GEA 24)
  • OAT sensor (GTP 59)
  • GPS antennas, Synthetic Vision, backup battery
  • NAVCOMS Garmin GNC 255 — Transponder Garmin GTX335 GPS/WAAS (ADS-B Out) + ACK A-30
  • Compass LXS

Engine

  • Bombardier Rotax 912S / ULS — 100 hp
  • Fuel: Unleaded automotive gasoline or AVGAS 100LL
